fields.title: skill-manage: system prompt nudging
fields.description: Plan: docs/plans/2026-03-27-agentic-skill-creation.md — Task 6. Register before_agent_start handler that appends skill creation guidance to system prompt. Three nudging layers: memory guidance, skills index header, tool description.
fields.notes: Added before_agent_start system prompt nudging in extensions/tau/src/skill-manage/index.ts immediately after tool registration, using the planned self-improvement guidance. Verification: cd extensions/tau && npx tsc --noEmit passes; cd extensions/tau && npm run gate passes with lint clean and 146/146 tests.
